title: Villagers Had Enough
description: Villagers will get aggressive when you steal, grief, or attack.
body:
No more shall the villagers have to suffer from players stealing, griefing, and attacking their village and villagers. Now they can fend for themselves when they need to. Now when you enter a village you must be carful or else... 

Features:
- Aggressive villagers.
- Village grief and theft awareness.
- Angry villagers won't trade with the player.
- Save the village from a raid for villagers to forgive you.
- Villagers will assist other villagers when needed.
